subcodes.first_line: Say: O Lord my God! Praise be unto Thee for having made me an utterer of Thy Name and a servant of Thy Cause, and for having distinguished me among [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل اللهم یا الهی لک الحمد بما جعلتنی ناطقا باسمک و خادما لامرک و خصصتنی بین
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for teaching
